name: Szechwan Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Miniature corn on the cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook Angel hair pasta until al dente.
2. Dice turkey, red bell peppers, and peeled carrots.
3. Drain water chestnuts and slice into thin strips.
4. Remove stems from cilantro leaves; set aside for garnish.
5. Chop green onions.
6. Slice corn on the cob and snow peas diagonally into thin strips.
7. Toast sesame seeds; reserve 1 tablespoon for garnish.
8. Toss all ingredients together in a large bowl.
9. Combine dressing ingredients (mayonaise, soy sauce, Szechwan hot oil, sesame oil, Dijon mustard, garlic) in a food processor and blend until smooth.
10. Add dressing to salad and toss well.
11. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and cilantro leaves.
